direction: API comparison between flutter_pty and portable_pty

portable_pty_api.exit_code: pty.tryWait() - non-blocking, returns null if running

critical: portable_pty uses SYNCHRONOUS read (readSync) instead of stream-based output
flutter_pty uses Pty.start() as constructor, portable_pty uses PortablePty.open() + .spawn()
api_differences.migration_effort: HIGH - requires fundamental architecture change from stream-based to synchronous polling

findings: portable_pty API is fundamentally different from flutter_pty
Biggest issue: portable_pty uses synchronous read (readSync) instead of stream-based output
This requires architectural changes to LocalTerminalService
Migration effort is HIGH - not a simple find-and-replace
kyroon_pty has identical API but same SPM problem as flutter_pty
